name: Roof Rush 3D
description: Roof Rush 3D is a high-octane urban runner where you navigate a pole-vaulting master across a dangerous city skyline. Collect pieces to grow your pole and use it to slide across parallel rails, but stay centered—lose your balance, and you fall! Dodge saws and obstacles that shrink your pole while progressing through vibrant, color-shifting levels. Unlock cool skins like the Ninja or Zombie, dominate the Endless mode, and reach the finish line for a cinematic victory celebration.
instructions: Move Click and drag or slide Left and Right Run Automatic Rail Sliding Keep the player centered between rails Growth Pick up cylinders to extend your pole Survival Avoid red blocks and saws to prevent the pole from breaking
